title: Structural noise-marker check on fixture purpose and decision id

evidence.ref: PR #80 (cycle-40) and #82 (cycle-41) both landed within hours of D021 with new purpose wordings outside the D018+D020 banlist; the dedup loop continued as predicted
fixtures/positive/decision/decision-positive-cycle-1780487500.* — pre-deletion sample of the noise pattern
fixtures/positive/decision/decision-positive-cycle-1780489000.* — pre-deletion sample of the noise pattern
018-fixture-purpose-banlist — banlist seeds work but each costs a decision record per wording variant
020-extend-purpose-banlist-cycle-39 — exactly the per-variant escalation D023 obsoletes

guards.ref: internal/probe.noiseMarkerReason — scans meta.purpose (raw) for cycle-N regex AND decision fixture data for 999- id prefix; rejects before banlist+dedup so noise dies on first occurrence
concept-map C-012 — codifies the structural-fingerprint rule and the 999-/000- id convention

examples: Before D023: cycle-40 purpose 'Verify accepted decision fixture remains valid for top-down governance scope in cycle 40' normalizes uniquely and is not on the banlist → passes. After D023: raw purpose contains 'cycle 40' → rejected as noise marker.
Before D023: cycle fixture data id '999-fixture-positive-cycle-1780489000' passes all schema checks. After D023: id starts with 999- → rejected as reserved-placeholder.

Canonical fixture id renamed 999-fixture-positive → 000-fixture-positive-minimal so the same rule applies uniformly. 000- becomes the reserved synthetic-fixture range; 999- becomes the reserved do-not-use range.
counterexamples: Real decision records (e.g. 022-ssotdeps-cross-check) are untouched — the 999- rule applies only to fixtures whose meta.fixture_type == 'decision'.
Purposes that mention the English word 'cycle' without a digit (e.g. 'cycle-level acceptance tests') pass — the regex requires \bcycle[\s-]\d+\b.

Future structural patterns (e.g. self-referencing evidence.ref pointing at the fixture's own path) can be added to noiseMarkerReason via a successor decision without changing the surrounding architecture.
